name: TimelineItem
description: One entry of the changelog-style CV timeline: square accent marker on a vertical line, optional semver label.

useCases: Any chronological list that should read as release history

antiPatterns.reason: It renders an <li>; loose list items break document semantics.
antiPatterns.alternative: Wrap entries in a list element (see /about).

a11y: Marker is aria-hidden; all information is carried by text
Version, title, meta and period are separate text nodes, readable in order
